title: 08675_Monitoring_AI-Modified_Content_at_Scale_A_Case_Study_on_the_Impact_of_ChatGPT_on_AI_Conference_Peer_Reviews
positive_examples: Provides a method for the study of LLM use at scale.
Inspires further social analysis and productive community reflection.
Aims to inform policy decisions about LLM use in information ecosystems.
negative_examples: Potential ramifications of LLM use to scientific publishing.
Acknowledges several limitations in the study that could impact its findings.
